summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OpsFlow dashboard with historical email import. All requirements successfully met - 235 tickets from brands displayed, analytics working with real data, WebSocket integration functional. Backend APIs 100% successful, frontend dashboards loading perfectly with real brand data (Blitznow, Netmeds, Giva, Clickpost, etc.).
passed_tests: GET /api/tickets/ returns 235 tickets with real brand data (Blitznow, Netmeds, Giva, Clickpost)
GET /api/analytics/summary returns 235 total issues and 20 clients
GET /api/analytics/summary (no period param) returns all-time data correctly
GET /api/analytics/summary?period=1m returns filtered data for 1 month period
GET /api/analytics/issues-by-client returns 20 brands with issue data
GET /api/analytics/issue-types returns 9 issue types with distribution
GET /api/analytics/time-series returns 18 daily count data points
Frontend Support Dashboard shows 235 ticket cards with real brand names
Frontend Analytics Dashboard loads with All Time selected showing 235 total issues and 20 clients
WebSocket endpoint /api/ws/tickets is accessible and ping/pong working
Historical import endpoint working (235 tickets from techsupport@blitznow.in)
Search functionality working on Support Dashboard
Period filters working on Analytics Dashboard (All Time, 1 Month, 1 Year)
Charts displaying real data (bar chart, pie chart, line chart)
Real brand data visible: Blitznow as top client, multiple brands in charts
Issue type distribution showing realistic categories (Delay/TAT, Order Creation, etc.)
WebSocket real-time connection established and maintained
